ability.en: Once per game, at night, choose 2 players (not yourself): you learn if they are the same alignment.
ability.es-419: Una vez por juego, por la noche, escoge 2 jugadores (no tú mismo): tú aprendes si ellos son del mismo alineamiento.
ability.sv: En gång per spel, på natten, kan du välja 2 spelare (inte dig själv); du får veta om de är på samma lag.
ability.zh-Hans: 每局游戏限一次，在夜晚时，你可以选择除你以外的两名玩家：你会得知他们是否为同一阵营。
ability.cn: 每局游戏限一次，在夜晚时，你可以选择除你以外的两名玩家：你会得知他们是否为同一阵营。

flavor_text.en: "Did you hear that stranger in the cashmere coat put the word on our young Belle? And she said yes? Well, that's nothing compared to what Harry and that juggler got up to at the fair! The things I could say if I was a tattletale... my, yes."
flavor_text.es-419: ¿Escuchaste que ese fulano en el abrigo de lana le pidió la mano a nuestra pequeña Belle? ¿Y que ella dijo que sí? ¡Pues, eso no es nada comparado a lo que Harry y ese malabarista estaban tramando en la feria! La cantidad de cosas que podría decir si fuera una chismosa…sí que sí.
flavor_text.sv: Hörde du att främlingen i kaschmirrocken friade till unga Isabella? Och att hon sa ja? Och det är ändå ingenting emot vad Harry och den där jonglören hade för sig på marknaden! Du anar inte vad jag skulle kunna berätta om jag varit en skvallerbytta… oj oj oj.
flavor_text.zh-Hans: 你听到那个穿羊绒大衣的家伙对我们小贝尔说什么了吗？他说……‘好’？哎，行吧，和哈利还有那个杂耍艺人那一出相比，这算不了什么。说什么？我可不说，我又不是什么长舌妇。
flavor_text.cn: “你听到那个穿羊绒大衣的家伙对我们小贝尔说什么了吗？他说……‘好’？哎，行吧，和哈利还有那个杂耍艺人那一出相比，这算不了什么。说什么？我可不说，我又不是什么长舌妇。”

first_night.en: The Seamstress might choose 2 players. Nod or shake your head. :reminder:
first_night.es-419: La Costurera quizás escoja 2 jugadores. Asiente o deniega con la cabeza. :reminder:
first_night.sv: Sömmerskan kanske väljer 2 spelare. Nicka eller skaka på huvudet. :reminder:
first_night.zh-Hans: 女裁缝可以选择两名玩家。要么点头代表是，要么摇头代表否。:reminder:

other_nights.en: The Seamstress might choose 2 players. Nod or shake your head. :reminder:
other_nights.es-419: La Costurera quizás escoja 2 jugadores. Asiente o deniega con la cabeza. :reminder:
other_nights.sv: Sömmerskan kanske väljer 2 spelare. Nicka eller skaka på huvudet. :reminder:
other_nights.zh-Hans: 女裁缝可以选择两名玩家。要么点头代表是，要么摇头代表否。:reminder:

how_to_run.cn:
每个夜晚，唤醒女裁缝。她要么摇头不使用能力，要么指向另两名玩家。
如果她摇头，无事发生。让女裁缝重新入睡。
如果她指向两名玩家，要么点头代表是（表示这些玩家是同一阵营），要么摇头代表否（表示这些玩家不是同一阵营）。让女裁缝重新入睡。在女裁缝使用能力后，为她放置“失去能力”提示标记，并从夜晚顺序表上移除她的夜晚标记。
how_to_run.en:
Each night, wake the Seamstress. They either shake their head no or point at any two players except themself.
If they shake their head no, nothing happens. Put the Seamstress to sleep.
If they point at two players, either nod your head yes (to indicate these players have the same alignment) or shake your head no (to indicate these players do not have the same alignment). Put the Seamstress to sleep. The Seamstress loses their ability - mark them with the NO ABILITY reminder and remove their night token from the night sheet.

cn: 在第一个夜晚，女裁缝选择了两名玩家，他们是理发师和钟表匠。因为他俩都是善良的，女裁缝得知“是”。
在前三个夜晚，女裁缝选择不使用他的能力。在第四个夜晚，她选择了两名玩家，他们分别是方古和心上人，女裁缝得知“否”。
麻脸巫婆把数学家变成了女巫，女巫仍然是善良的。当晚，女裁缝选择了两名玩家，他们是女巫和城镇公告员。女裁缝得知“是”，因为他们是善良的。
en: During the first night, the Seamstress chooses two players, who are the Barber and the Clockmaker. Because they are both good, the Seamstress learns a "yes.”
During the first three nights, the Seamstress chooses not to use their ability. During the fourth night, they choose two players, who are the Fang Gu and the Sweetheart. The Seamstress learns a "no.”

The Pit-Hag turns the Mathematician into the Witch, who remains good. Later that night, the Seamstress chooses the two players, the Witch and the Town Crier. The Seamstress learns a "yes" because they are both good.

cn: 你可以过几天再使用你的能力。虽然这有一定的风险，你很可能在这段时间内死亡，但是如果你等待一段时间，你就会对当前局势有一定的了解，比如大家都说自己是什么角色以及你觉得谁可疑。这也意味着随着处决以及恶魔击杀玩家，只有更少的活着的玩家供你选择。
尽快的使用你的能力！你只有一次机会，如果你在还没使用时就死去了，你肯定会为此自责。即使在首夜随机选两个玩家也比到时候一个都选不了好。
一个常见的女裁缝易犯的错误是没有记住你辨识的是是否是同一阵营——而不是是否是"善良"阵营。这也就意味着，如果你足够幸运直接选择了两名邪恶玩家，那你依然会得到信息"是"。虽然你更有可能是选到两名善良玩家，但是如果你并不确定，你可以尝试协同其他玩家的信息（如钟表匠），来看看是否关联到你的信息。你也可以在你还没有揭露他们是同一阵营时观察这两名玩家，看看他们是否相互串通或包庇。
如果你有一个很信任的玩家（不管活着还是死了），你可以参照他来确认其他玩家的阵营。如果你得知他们属于不同阵营，那么你可以确信另一个玩家会是邪恶的那一个。这在处理棘手的镜像双子时尤其有效。
把能力用在那些你不太了解的人身上！得知两名玩家是否同一阵营是非常强力的，这可以帮助大家决定是否相信他们是某一角色以及是否相信他们的所作所为。
把能力用在那些对游戏有重要影响的角色身上。弄清楚博学者或者卖花女孩是否可信要比弄清楚理发师是否可信要更有效。
一般情况下，不要选择那些你的邻座玩家。如果你坐在诺-达鲺旁边，他们会使你中毒并且会非常赞同你的观点。通过选择离你更远的玩家，虽然你仍然可能因为中毒得到错误信息，但是至少你可以知道他们之中没有恶魔来搅局。
en: Wait a couple of days before using your ability. This has some risk attached because you can obviously be killed in that time, but waiting will give you an idea of the layout of the game, who is claiming what, and who you find suspicious. It also means there is a smaller pool of alive players to choose from since there will have been executions and demon kills.

Use your ability as soon as possible! You only have one shot, and if you die before you use it, then you'll be kicking yourself. Even picking two random players on the first night is better than picking nobody!

A common mistake that Seamstresses can make is not remembering that you detect the same alignment - not "good" alignment. This means if you get lucky enough to pick two evil players, then they will register as 'Yes' for your ability. It is much more likely to get two good players, but if you're not sure, try coordinating your information with other information gatherers (e.g. Clockmaker) and see if they line up with your concerns. You can also watch your two players and see if they begin colluding before you get a chance to reveal they're the same alignment.

If you have a player that you trust is good (alive or dead), you can use this person as a reference point for another player's alignment. If you get they are of different alignments, then you can be reasonably sure it's the unknown player that's the evil one. This is especially potent when dealing with a troublesome Evil Twin.

Use your ability on people you don't know much about! Learning whether two people are on the same team or not is very powerful, and will help you decide whether or not to trust them when they begin revealing who they are and what they do.

Pick people for your ability that have a lot of sway over the game. Figuring out if a Savant or Flowergirl claim is legitimate is usually more potent than figuring out if that Barber is being upfront.

In general, try to pick players who are not your neighbour. If you are sitting next to a No Dashii, they will poison you and of course read positively to your information. By picking players further away from you, you will still be getting poisoned information, but at least you know there isn't a potential demon in the mix muddying things up further.
